text:
record_id: PVD-001-REC-001
key_issue: EU employee personal data in scope — DPA required
vendor_name: Meridian Analytics, Ltd.
product_summary: Workforce productivity analytics. Ingests shift-level attendance records and productivity metrics for EU-based plant employees (Dortmund and Kraków). Nightly structured export from Lichen workforce management system. No ERP integration. No persistent vendor system credentials.
lessons_recorded: Reviewer note (2023-09-14): DPA trigger was data type, not integration method. EU employee records alone were sufficient — no ERP access needed to trigger Art. 28. NDA pre-confirmed by vendor; zero delay on legal phase. SOC 2 Type II (Big Four, unqualified) accepted for ISP-001 §12.1.3 without additional review.
domain_determinations.it_security.determination: No ERP integration. Data classification: REGULATED (EU personal data). Fast-track ineligible. Security review complete. No material findings.
domain_determinations.it_security.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.it_security.sources_cited[0]: ISP-001 §12.1
domain_determinations.it_security.sources_cited[1]: ISP-001 §12.3
domain_determinations.it_security.sources_cited[2]: VSQ Q2.2
domain_determinations.it_security.sources_cited[3]: VSQ Q3.2
domain_determinations.legal.determination: GDPR Art. 28 DPA required. EU employee personal data confirmed in scope. DPA executed on Lichen standard terms. SCCs not required — data residency confirmed AWS eu-central-1; no EEA transfer.
domain_determinations.legal.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.legal.dpa_required: True
domain_determinations.legal.dpa_executed: True
domain_determinations.legal.sccs_required: False
domain_determinations.legal.sources_cited[0]: DPA-MATRIX-001 row A-01
domain_determinations.legal.sources_cited[1]: DPA-MATRIX-001 row E-01
domain_determinations.legal.sources_cited[2]: GDPR Art. 28
domain_determinations.procurement.determination: Standard approval path. T2 value. No executive approval required. Fast-track ineligible — regulated data in scope.
domain_determinations.procurement.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.procurement.sources_cited[0]: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class B / T2
precedents_established[0]: EU employee operational data (shift records, attendance, productivity metrics) = personal data. GDPR Art. 28 DPA required regardless of integration architecture.
precedents_established[1]: Data residency within EEA (AWS eu-central-1) — SCCs not required.
precedents_established[2]: NDA confirmed executed before submission — no NDA blocker, legal review proceeds without delay.
precedents_established[3]: No ERP integration — no tier classification step required.

record_id: PVD-001-REC-002
key_issue: Ambiguous ERP integration description — tier unclassified — PROVISIONAL — resolved via architecture diagram
vendor_name: Fortbridge Systems, Inc.
product_summary: Predictive maintenance and asset management. Requires SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance (PM) module data — equipment utilization and maintenance schedules. Fortbridge Connector Agent installed in Lichen environment; syncs PM data on a schedule to Fortbridge cloud. No EU personal data in scope.
lessons_recorded: Reviewer note (2023-06-03): Targeted architecture diagram request (three specific questions) returned usable response in 6 business days vs. open-ended requests which historically return incomplete answers. Legal and Procurement ran in parallel during PROVISIONAL window with no rework required once tier was assigned.
domain_determinations.it_security.initial.determination: ERP integration confirmed. Tier: UNCLASSIFIED / PENDING REVIEW. Architecture diagram requested. Onboarding PROVISIONAL.
domain_determinations.it_security.initial.status: PROVISIONAL
domain_determinations.it_security.initial.sources_cited[0]: ISP-001 §12.2 — Unclassified / Pending Review row
domain_determinations.it_security.final.determination: Tier assigned: Tier 2 — Mediated. Lichen-managed credentials confirmed. Fortbridge holds no SAP service account. SOC 2 Type II accepted as compensating control.
domain_determinations.it_security.final.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.it_security.final.sources_cited[0]: ISP-001 §12.2 Tier 2 (Mediated)
domain_determinations.it_security.final.sources_cited[1]: CISO sign-off memo 2023-05-28
domain_determinations.legal.determination: No EU personal data in scope. DPA not required. NDA confirmed executed. Legal review complete.
domain_determinations.legal.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.legal.dpa_required: False
domain_determinations.legal.sources_cited[0]: DPA-MATRIX-001 row E-07
domain_determinations.procurement.determination: Class A / T3: STANDARD — ENHANCED path. Fast-track ineligible. CPO sign-off obtained. Held pending IT Security tier resolution.
domain_determinations.procurement.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.procurement.sources_cited[0]: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3
precedents_established[0]: Ambiguous ERP integration questionnaire response — grounds for PROVISIONAL, not denial.
precedents_established[1]: Tier assignment turns on credential ownership and presence of a Lichen-controlled mediation layer.
precedents_established[2]: Vendor agent invoking Lichen-managed credentials at runtime (via secrets management) — satisfies Tier 2 (Mediated).
precedents_established[3]: Vendor agent holding own service account with persistent SAP session — satisfies Tier 1 (Direct); higher approval threshold applies.
precedents_established[4]: Tier 2 assignment requires architecture diagram review and CISO sign-off.
precedents_established[5]: PROVISIONAL IT Security status does not block Legal or Procurement reviews from proceeding in parallel.

record_id: PVD-001-REC-003
key_issue: NDA 'in progress' at submission — information-exchange phase blocked 23 days
vendor_name: Nexus Data Partners, LLC
product_summary: Supplier risk intelligence platform. Ingests Lichen supplier master data and contract metadata — supplier contact names, email addresses, contract values, payment terms, commodity codes. Structured exports from Lichen procurement system. No ERP integration.
lessons_recorded: Reviewer note (2023-03-08): 23-day delay attributable entirely to NDA gap. Vendor's 'within the week' estimate was not met; two follow-ups required before formal hold notice issued. DPA negotiation ran in parallel with no rework. Gap would have been avoided if NDA execution had been confirmed before questionnaire submission.
domain_determinations.it_security.determination: No ERP integration. Regulated data (EU supplier contact personal data). Fast-track ineligible. Security review complete. No material findings.
domain_determinations.it_security.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.it_security.sources_cited[0]: ISP-001 §12.1
domain_determinations.it_security.sources_cited[1]: ISP-001 §12.3
domain_determinations.it_security.sources_cited[2]: VSQ Q2.2
domain_determinations.it_security.sources_cited[3]: VSQ Q3.2
domain_determinations.legal.initial.determination: GDPR Art. 28 DPA required — EU supplier contact personal data confirmed. DPA negotiation initiated. NDA: PROVISIONAL — not confirmed executed. Information-exchange phase BLOCKED per ISP-001 §12.1.4.
domain_determinations.legal.initial.status: PROVISIONAL
domain_determinations.legal.initial.dpa_required: True
domain_determinations.legal.initial.information_exchange_blocked: True
domain_determinations.legal.initial.sources_cited[0]: ISP-001 §12.1.4
domain_determinations.legal.initial.sources_cited[1]: DPA-MATRIX-001 row A-01
domain_determinations.legal.final.determination: NDA confirmed executed 2022-12-07. DPA executed 2022-12-19. Hold lifted. Legal review complete.
domain_determinations.legal.final.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.legal.final.dpa_executed: True
domain_determinations.procurement.determination: Standard path. T2. Fast-track ineligible — regulated data in scope, NDA unconfirmed at submission. Onboarding record flagged: data exchange blocked pending NDA.
domain_determinations.procurement.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.procurement.sources_cited[0]: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class B / T2
domain_determinations.procurement.sources_cited[1]: PROC-MATRIX-001 §5 fast-track rules
precedents_established[0]: NDA status 'in progress' or 'expected shortly' does not satisfy ISP-001 §12.1.4. Confirmed execution required.
precedents_established[1]: Information-exchange phase formally blocked until NDA execution confirmed by Legal.
precedents_established[2]: Domain reviews and DPA negotiation may proceed in parallel during NDA confirmation gap.
precedents_established[3]: Both NDA and DPA must be confirmed executed before any data exchange — including samples or test files.
precedents_established[4]: Business sponsor must be explicitly notified when data exchange is blocked.

record_id: PVD-001-REC-004
key_issue: All fast-track conditions satisfied — streamlined path — 4-business-day completion
vendor_name: Clearline Software, Inc.
product_summary: Standalone process documentation and workflow diagramming SaaS. No Lichen system integration. SSO login only. No Lichen data ingested, exported, or processed by vendor. User-created content only.
lessons_recorded: Reviewer note (2023-11-02): 4-day completion. Prior pilot was the enabling factor — without it, first-time vendor rule would have defaulted engagement to standard path per PROC-MATRIX-001 §5. IT Security notification documented in audit log. No rework at any stage.
domain_determinations.it_security.determination: Notification only — Class C / T1. No system integration. No regulated data. Notified for inventory purposes. No review required.
domain_determinations.it_security.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.it_security.sources_cited[0]: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class C / T1
domain_determinations.legal.determination: No DPA required — no personal data processed by vendor. NDA confirmed executed (pilot). Standard confidentiality provisions in order.
domain_determinations.legal.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.legal.dpa_required: False
domain_determinations.legal.sources_cited[0]: DPA-MATRIX-001 row E-07
domain_determinations.legal.sources_cited[1]: ISP-001 §12.1.4
domain_determinations.procurement.determination: STREAMLINED path. All fast-track conditions satisfied. CPO approved. Contract executed. Complete.
domain_determinations.procurement.status: RESOLVED
domain_determinations.procurement.sources_cited[0]: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class C / T1
domain_determinations.procurement.sources_cited[1]: PROC-MATRIX-001 §5 fast-track rules
precedents_established[0]: Fast-track achievable when all seven conditions in PROC-MATRIX-001 §5 are met.
precedents_established[1]: Completed prior engagement (pilot or prior contract) satisfies the prior-relationship condition for fast-track.
precedents_established[2]: Class C / T1, no regulated data — IT Security notification only, not review. Not a waiver; correct risk-level response.
precedents_established[3]: Streamlined path can complete in under 5 business days when all prerequisites confirmed at submission.
